description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.4 Docker image with a global before_script that installs bundler (gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc), runs bundle install --jobs $(nproc) --path vendor, and creates a tmp directory. Cache the vendor/ruby directory. Define two stages: test and release. In the test stage add an rspec job that runs rspec, uses an elasticsearch service (docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:5.6.3) aliased as elasticsearch, and sets ELASTICSEARCH_URL, ELASTICSEARCH_USERNAME, ELASTICSEARCH_PASSWORD variables. Also add a rubocop job that runs rubocop. In the release stage add a release-gem job that runs only on tags and executes: mkdir -p ~/.gem; echo -e "---\n:rubygems_api_key: $RUBYGEMS_API_KEY" > ~/.gem/credentials; chmod 0600 ~/.gem/credentials; GEM_VERSION=$(echo $CI_COMMIT_TAG|sed 's/[^.0-9]//g'); sed -i -e "s/0.0.0/$GEM_VERSION/g" lib/mindex/version.rb; gem build mindex.gemspec; gem push mindex-$GEM_VERSION.gem -k rubygems.
